summary: Yt Page Scroll Metrics component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「页面卷动完成率漏斗」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-page-scroll-metrics/src/YtPageScrollMetrics.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtPageScrollMetrics` and `ytPageScrollMetricsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Page Scroll Metrics Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-page-scroll-metrics to my project. Preserve the exported YtPageScrollMetricsProps API and register the YtPageScrollMetrics composition with the default props.
